Are you building something and want to keep track of progress in one place? 

 With this app you can do so quickly and easily. 

 It allows you to capture photos with the in-built camera page facilitating document scanning. Photos can also be captured using the camera app or simply imported from storage. Photos are organized in projects allowing you to keep related images together. 

 An unlimited number of photos can be combined into a single PDF document which again can be shared or stored locally. Sharing allows uploading the documents to any cloud provider accepting PDF documents like for example DropBox or Google Drive but there are sure to be more. 

 The app is free for use showing advertisements to recover development expenses. If yes, the Call Log app is what you need.

It provides you with a better overview of your calls to keep track of overall call durations. Filters allow you to look at predefined and custom date ranges to find out how outgoing and incoming calls are distributed over time.

In addition the app includes a home screen widget showing the overall outgoing call duration for the current month. Are you building something and want to keep track of progress in one place? 

 With this app you can do so quickly and easily. 

 It allows you to capture photos with the in-built camera page facilitating document scanning. Photos can also be captured using the camera app or simply imported from storage. Photos are organized in projects allowing you to keep related images together. 

 An unlimited number of photos can be combined into a single PDF document which again can be shared or stored locally. Sharing allows uploading the documents to any cloud provider accepting PDF documents like for example DropBox or Google Drive but there are sure to be more. 

 The app is free for use showing advertisements to recover development expenses. You can disable the advertisements for an uninterrupted experience via in-app subscription options.", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [14, 714, 1426, 1863], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"ancestors": ["android.widget.ImageView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "resource-id": "com.muzurisana.birthdayfree:id/illustrationLayoutPhotoToPDF", "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatImageView", "bounds": [14, 280, 448, 714], "componentLabel": "Image"}, {"text": "Photo To PDF", "resource-id": "com.muzurisana.birthdayfree:id/photoToPDFHeading", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [448, 336, 1426, 467], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Free
